goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: Playwright screenshot injection, not product hydration: repo has no caret mutation; screenshots default caret hide, temporarily adding transparent caret styles across editable inputs during hydration. Add caret initial to the existing screenshot call only; keep zero-error assertion unfiltered.

worker_package.objective: Add only screenshot caret initial in cooking E2E, then complete every final gate.
verify: Require E2E/CSS/TSX/config hashes and one-option diff.
Run scoped format/lint and fresh default-context cooking E2E with unchanged zero-error assertion.
Run full gates, isolated build, three protected E2Es, disposable DB, live PID/port/hash/diff/status integrity.
stop_if: Hashes differ or diff beyond caret initial.
Warning remains or wait/filter/suppression/source/config change needed.

parallel_safety.rationale: One clean browser lifecycle then serial oracles.
